chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-547 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.03.2022 Mr. Kamaluddin advocate along with Asghar Ali Kharal, Additional Registrar (Legal) Quaid-e-Awan University of Engineering, Science & Technology, Nawabshah. ----- The Additional Registrar (Legal), Quaid-e-Awan University of Engineering, Science & Technology, Nawabshah, is present and has filed a statement that the petitioner’s departmental appeal is allowed and he has been reinstated. The statement is taken on record. Perhaps for this reason the petitioner has not appeared. The petition is accordingly disposed of along with pending applications in terms of the statement and the attached order of the Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
